uploads.title: Uploads
uploads.subtitle: Every PDF you've uploaded for AI analysis, across all projects.
uploads.emptyDescription: Open a project and upload a PDF to get an AI-generated summary, strengths, weaknesses and suggested citations.

uploadDetail.notDescribed: Not described in the extracted text.
uploadDetail.noCitationSuggestions: No citation suggestions for this source.
uploadDetail.analyzing: Analyzing this PDF — this usually takes under a minute.
uploadDetail.analysisFailed: Analysis failed for this file. Try deleting it and uploading again.
uploadDetail.noAnalysisAvailable: This upload completed but no analysis is available.

uploadDropzone.instructions: Drag & drop a PDF, or click to browse
uploadDropzone.uploadStarted: Upload started — analyzing in the background.
